---
title: marshal-receiver
description: "Keep marshal receiver types consistent."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🟡 `warning`

Keep marshal receiver types consistent. Strider default: standard method families.

## Bad

```go
func (value Value) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error)
func (value *Value) UnmarshalJSON([]byte) error
```

## Good

```go
func (value *Value) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error)
func (value *Value) UnmarshalJSON([]byte) error
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only marshal-receiver`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
